chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1040 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.3777/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No.3778/2022 4. For hearing of main case 07-09-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the grievances of the petitioners have been redressed and this petition has served its purpose, as such he does not press the same, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
